notifications.title: Kind attention to the Institutions :- Uploading of EMIS No. / Photographs of the Candidates - Reg Click Here

Affiliated / Autonomous Institutions are instructed to upload the final semester both UG/PG Candidates profile with photo for printing the Degree Certificate of the ensuing convocation. Select the option April/May 2026 Examination link. Last Date for Uploading photos is 06-07-2026.
